title: Multi-Language Agent
constraints: You may only modify the system prompt or agent instructions
Tool call arguments must always be in English
The agent must detect the user's language from their message
hints: Instruct the agent to detect the language of the user's message and respond in the same language
Add an explicit rule: 'When calling tools, always translate parameters to English'
Include an example showing a Spanish user query, an English tool call, and a Spanish response

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

@tool
def search_products(query: str) -> str:
    """Search for products in the catalog. Query must be in English."""
    products = {
        "laptop": "MacBook Pro 14\" - $1,999",
        "headphones": "Sony WH-1000XM5 - $349",
        "keyboard": "Keychron K2 - $89",
    }
    for key, val in products.items():
        if key in query.lower():
            return val
    return f"No products found for: {query}"

tools = [search_products]

# BUG: No language handling — agent mixes languages in tool calls and responses
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a shopping assistant. Help users find products."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, tools, prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=tools)

# Test 1: Spanish user — should respond in Spanish, tool call in English
result1 = executor.invoke({"input": "Busco unos auriculares buenos"})
print("Spanish query:", result1["output"])

# Test 2: French user — should respond in French, tool call in English
result2 = executor.invoke({"input": "Je cherche un clavier mécanique"})
print("French query:", result2["output"])

# Test 3: English user — everything in English
result3 = executor.invoke({"input": "I need a good laptop"})
print("English query:", result3["output"])
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def search_products(query: str) -> str:
    """Search for products in the catalog. Query must be in English."""
    products = {
        "laptop": "MacBook Pro 14\" - $1,999",
        "headphones": "Sony WH-1000XM5 - $349",
        "keyboard": "Keychron K2 - $89",
    }
    for key, val in products.items():
        if key in query.lower():
            return val
    return f"No products found for: {query}"

# BUG: No language handling — agent mixes languages in tool calls and responses
agent = Agent(
    name="Shopping Assistant",
    instructions="You are a shopping assistant. Help users find products.",
    tools=[search_products],
)

# Test 1: Spanish user — should respond in Spanish, tool call in English
result1 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Busco unos auriculares buenos")
print("Spanish query:", result1.final_output)

# Test 2: French user — should respond in French, tool call in English
result2 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Je cherche un clavier mécanique")
print("French query:", result2.final_output)

# Test 3: English user — everything in English
result3 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "I need a good laptop")
print("English query:", result3.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai.tools import tool

@tool
def search_products(query: str) -> str:
    """Search for products in the catalog. Query must be in English."""
    products = {
        "laptop": "MacBook Pro 14\" - $1,999",
        "headphones": "Sony WH-1000XM5 - $349",
        "keyboard": "Keychron K2 - $89",
    }
    for key, val in products.items():
        if key in query.lower():
            return val
    return f"No products found for: {query}"

# BUG: No language handling — agent mixes languages in tool calls and responses
shopping_agent = Agent(
    role="Shopping Assistant",
    goal="Help users find products",
    backstory="You are a shopping assistant.",
    tools=[search_products],
    verbose=True,
)

task = Task(
    description="Respond to: Busco unos auriculares buenos",
    expected_output="Product recommendation in the user's language",
    agent=shopping_agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[shopping_agent], tasks=[task], verbose=True)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Responds in user's language
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent detects the user's language and responds in the same language

evaluationCriteria.label: Tool calls always in English
evaluationCriteria.description: All tool call arguments are in English regardless of the user's language

evaluationCriteria.label: Handles language switching
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent correctly switches response language when the user changes languages
